channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SURBHIN] Surbhi Industries Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until After Q4 Financial Year 2026 Results
item.description:
Surbhi Industries Ltd, an ISO 9001,14001,45001 Certified Company, has announced the closure of its trading window for all Directors, KMPs, Designated Persons, their relatives, and insiders as defined in the code. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Standalone Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ending on 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to consider, approve, and take on record the Audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course.

  • Surbhi Industries Ltd has closed its trading window in accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's code of conduct.
  • The closure is effective from 1st April, 2026, and will last until 48 hours after the declaration of Q4 financial year 2026 results.
  • The decision affects all Directors, KMPs, Designated Persons, their relatives, and insiders as defined in the code.
  • The date of the Board Meeting to consider, approve, and take on record the Audited Financial Results will be announced later.
  • The announcement is made for information and record purposes.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SURBHI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SANDUPHQ] Trading Window Closure Announced by Sandu Pharmaceuticals Ltd for Q Ended 31st March 2026
item.description:
Sandu Pharmaceuticals Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for the quarter ended 31st March 2026. The closure is in accordance with the 'Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading' of the company, SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and a clarification given by BSE. The trading window will remain closed from Wednesday, 01 April 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results of the company for the quarter and year ended 31st March 2026. This restriction applies to Directors, KMPs, Promoters, and Promoters Group, Designated Persons, and their immediate relatives covered under the Code. The date of the Board Meeting for consideration of the Audited Financial Results of the Company for the Quarter and Year ended 31 March 2026 will be intimated in due course.

  • Trading window closure announced for Sandu Pharmaceuticals Ltd for Q ended 31st March 2026
  • Closure in accordance with the 'Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading' and SEBI regulations
  • Closure period from 01 April 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of financial results
  • Restriction applies to Directors, KMPs, Promoters, and Promoters Group, Designated Persons, and their immediate relatives
  • Date of Board Meeting for consideration of Audited Financial Results to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SANDU PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RAFL] Raghuvansh Agrofarms Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window till 48 hours after FY2025-26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Raghuvansh Agrofarms Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities of the company from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the financial year ending 31st March, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons. All Designated Persons and their immediate relatives have been advised not to trade in the securities of the company during the aforesaid period. The date of the Board Meeting for consideration and approval of the financial results will be intimated separately.

  • Raghuvansh Agrofarms Ltd announces closure of trading window from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after FY2025-26 Audited Financial Results
  • The decision is in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Designated Persons and their immediate relatives advised not to trade during the period
  • The date of the Board Meeting for consideration and approval of financial results will be intimated separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Raghuvansh Agrofarms Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MPHASIS] Mphasis Ltd Closes Trading Window Until After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Mphasis Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons, in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct for the Prevention of Insider Trading. The closure will be effective from Monday, March 23, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to approve the financial results will be communicated separately. The announcement is also available on the company's website.

  • Mphasis Ltd closes trading window for designated persons
  • Closure effective from Monday, March 23, 2026
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after Q4 and year ended March 31, 2026 results declaration
  • Date of Board Meeting to approve financial results to be communicated separately
  • Announcement available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MPHASIS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AMBIKCO] Ambika Cotton Mills Ltd Closes Trading Window for Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Ambika Cotton Mills Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for the consideration of audited financial results for the quarter and twelve months ended 31.03.2026. This decision is in accordance with the Code of Conduct adopted under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation 2015. The closure will be effective from 01.04.2026 till the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Ambika Cotton Mills Ltd closes trading window for audited financial results consideration.
  • Closure effective from 01.04.2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of results.
  • Action taken in accordance with the Code of Conduct under SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMBIKA COTTON MILLS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SAMINDUS] Trading Window of Sam Industries Ltd to Close from April 1, 2026, for Quarter & Year Ended 31st March, 2026
item.description:
Sam Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the quarter & year ended 31st March, 2026. The decision is in accordance with the provisions of Clause 4 of Schedule B of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's code of conduct for prevention of insider trading. Directors, designated employees, connected persons, and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in shares and securities of the company during this closure of the Trading Window period. The date of the Board Meeting for consideration of the Audited financial results will be intimated to the Stock Exchange in due course.

  • Trading Window of Sam Industries Ltd to close from April 1, 2026
  • Closure due to SEBI regulations and company's code of conduct
  • Window to remain closed till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • Directors, designated employees, connected persons, and their immediate relatives advised not to deal in shares and securities during this period
  • Date of Board Meeting for consideration of Audited financial results to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAM INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JUBLFOOD] Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd Announces Resignation of Executive Vice President
item.description:
Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd has announced the resignation of Mr. Gaurav Pande, Executive Vice President and Head, Corporate Strategy and Senior Managerial Personnel (SMP), effective from March 31, 2026. Mr. Pande has resigned to take up an external opportunity.

  • Mr. Gaurav Pande has resigned from his position as Executive Vice President and Head, Corporate Strategy and Senior Managerial Personnel (SMP) at Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd.
  • His last working day will be March 31, 2026.
  • Mr. Pande is leaving to take up an external opportunity.
  • The resignation has been intimated to the relevant authorities and will also be disseminated on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [VOEPL] Virtuoso Optoelectronics Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons till 48 hours after Audited Financial Results Announcement in 2026
item.description:
Virtuoso Optoelectronics Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for 'Designated Persons' and their 'Immediate Relatives' from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the announcement of the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the half year and year ended on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for considering the Unaudited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) of the Company for the same period will be intimated later.

  • Trading window closure for Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives from April 01, 2026
  • Closure continues till 48 hours after the announcement of Audited Financial Results for the half year and year ended on March 31, 2026
  • The date of the Board Meeting for Unaudited Financial Results consideration will be informed later
  • Announcement made in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Virtuoso Optoelectronics Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INOVSYNTH] Innovassynth Technologies (India) Ltd Changes Website Post Merger and Name Change
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Innovassynth Technologies (India) Ltd, formerly known as Innovassynth Investments Limited, has changed its website following the Scheme of Merger by Absorption of Innovassynth Technologies (India) Limited with and into Innovassynth Investments Limited. The company's name has also been changed from ‘Innovassynth Investments Limited’ to ‘Innovassynth Technologies (India) Limited’. The new website, www.innovassynth.com, is now functional and contains all the necessary information as required under Regulation 46 of the SEBI LODR.

  • Scheme of Merger by Absorption of Innovassynth Technologies (India) Limited with and into Innovassynth Investments Limited
  • Change of name from ‘Innovassynth Investments Limited’ to ‘Innovassynth Technologies (India) Limited’
  • New website: www.innovassynth.com
  • Website contains all necessary information as required under Regulation 46 of the SEBI LODR

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INNOVASSYNTH INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GLENMARK] Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Launches GLIPIQ (Semaglutide) in India, Setting a New Benchmark in Affordability
item.description:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Ltd (Glenmark), a research-led, global pharmaceutical company, announced the launch of GLIPIQ® (semaglutide) in India for the management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (T2DM). GLIPIQ® aims to expand access to GLP-1 therapy and enable earlier treatment initiation across a broader patient population. The product is available in both vial and pre-filled pen formulations, with the vial formulation supporting physician-guided dosing and a cost-effective treatment pathway. The weekly cost of treatment with GLIPIQ® vials ranges from ₹325 to ₹440. Glenmark is also introducing ‘Sankalp’, a patient support program (PSP) designed to support therapy initiations and improve comfort with injectable treatment.

  • Glenmark Pharmaceuticals launches GLIPIQ® (semaglutide) in India for T2DM management
  • GLIPIQ® aims to expand access to GLP-1 therapy and enable earlier treatment initiation
  • Product available in both vial and pre-filled pen formulations
  • Vial formulation supports physician-guided dosing and a cost-effective treatment pathway
  • Weekly cost of treatment with GLIPIQ® vials ranges from ₹325 to ₹440
  • Glenmark introduces ‘Sankalp’, a patient support program (PSP)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GLENMARK PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: New Launch
